meeting_summary: The team reviewed the dashboard, RFID integration, local data storage, and hardware budget. The dashboard is nearly complete, while duplicate running sessions remain a technical issue.
key_decisions: Store treadmill data locally on the Raspberry Pi for the first prototype.
Do not build a real-time cloud system in the initial version.

action_items.action: Investigate duplicate running sessions and provide an update
Prepare a short cost comparison for an additional RFID reader

risks_or_blockers: Duplicate running sessions may affect data accuracy.
The budget for an additional RFID reader has not been approved.
open_questions: Will the budget for an additional RFID reader be approved?
follow_up_email:
Subject: Campus Fitness Tracking System – Meeting Follow-up

Hello team,

Thank you for today's discussion. We agreed to store treadmill data locally on the Raspberry Pi for the first prototype. Mya will update the mobile dashboard layout by Friday, and John will investigate the duplicate-session issue and report back next Monday. The team will also prepare a cost comparison for an additional RFID reader before the next meeting.

Our next meeting is scheduled for July 20 at 2:00 PM.

Best regards,
